PASS_STRONG.predicate: r(Phi_k_org, Phi_k_clm) >= 0.85 AND r(Phi_k_org, Phi_k_eeg) >= 0.85 AND |Phi_org - Phi_clm| / max(|Phi_org|, |Phi_clm|, 1e-3) <= 0.30
PASS_STRONG.meaning: first wetware empirical anchor of strong Putnam multi-realizability

PASS_PARTIAL.predicate: one of r_org_clm or r_org_eeg >= 0.85, the other in [0.50, 0.85); magnitude divergence <= 0.30

WEAK.predicate: both r in [0.50, 0.85); OR one >= 0.85 with magnitude divergence > 0.30

FAIL.predicate: both r < 0.50; OR substrate sign flip on either pair
FAIL.meaning: Putnam strong form falsified on this protocol; encoding revision required

bidirectional_falsifier_conditions.K_partition_variance: std(Phi_k_org) < 0.5 * |Phi_org|; overflow => verdict NULL, rerun mandatory
bidirectional_falsifier_conditions.null_hypothesis_floor: 1024 prompt-shuffled permutation; observed r must exceed 95-percentile of r_null; if r_null 95%ile > 0.85 then test under-powered, spec invalid
bidirectional_falsifier_conditions.reproducibility_3_seed: 3 independent ANIMA_SEED runs; all 3 same verdict for confirmed; 2/3 PASS = WEAK_PASS
bidirectional_falsifier_conditions.organoid_pool_variance: CV(Phi_org across 4 units) < 0.5 * mean(Phi_org); high CV => report individual-unit verdict instead of pool mean

organoid_specific_sanity_gates.stim_response_sanity: each organoid produces >= 5x baseline-rate response on at least 1 of 16 prompt-stims; FAIL => re-tune ROC encoding Δt and amplitude
organoid_specific_sanity_gates.stationarity: day-1 vs day-3 Phi_org drift <= 20%; exclude organoids with > 20% drift
organoid_specific_sanity_gates.spontaneous_activity_floor: baseline (no-stim) rate must allow stim-response SNR >= 3:1 on majority of channels
organoid_specific_sanity_gates.cell_death_control: per-organoid health flag from FinalSpark API GREEN throughout campaign; YELLOW/RED => discard mid-campaign data
